In a Shameless room, Simpa brings experience, pace, and the steady hand of someone who knows exactly where the floor can go.

name: Sinca
bio: Sinca is a Montréal-based DJ and producer whose melodic house and techno carry the warmth of her French-Canadian and Peruvian roots. Her releases on labels including Purified, Bedrock, and Anjunadeep have put her in the international conversation without flattening the personality out of her sound. She builds sets with lift and precision, balancing lush melodic pressure with drums that still know how to work a dark room. Sinca brings sunrise energy with backbone,polished, emotional, and built for dancers who want both beauty and drive.

name: Sky Rivers
bio: Sky Rivers began his journey in 1995, drawn into the pulse of acid house and the storytelling power of the dancefloor. Raised in Los Angeles, he immersed himself in DJ culture before becoming part of San Francisco’s scene from 2001–2006 under his first alias "Boris Collage" Following a formative tour through South America and the loss of his parents in 2008 and 2009, Rivers stepped away from the spotlight, redirecting his focus toward filmmaking and visual storytelling. Throughout this period, he remained deeply connected to music—collecting, curating, and playing intimate sets within close circles. In late 2023, an invitation from Monica Escalante to play In Transit in Los Angeles marked his return. The set reignited a renewed sense of purpose, opening a new chapter that bridges his history in dance music with years of refined artistic perspective.

name: Sloane Motion
bio: Born and raised in Bellevue, WA, Sloane quit her sales job during the pandemic and began DJing outdoors for 1,000+ fans weekly. She built residencies at Q Nightclub, Monkey Loft, The Crocodile, and The Woods, and became a resident DJ for C89.5, Seattle's largest EDM radio station. She has opened for Dom Dolla, Fisher, John Summit, Sidepiece, James Hype, Cloonee, Honeyluv, and many more.

name: Slope
bio: Seattle-based DJ and bass music producer in the PNW electronic music community. Known for high-energy sets blending bass music genres. Active on SoundCloud and in the Seattle underground scene.

name: Smash TV
bio: German electronic music duo (Holger and Kai) based in Berlin. Releases on Get Physical, Culprit, My Favourite Robot, and Mobilee. International touring act with a signature tech house sound.

name: Snapdragon
bio: Snapdragon (real name Denise Zhang) is a Seattle-based DJ and electronic producer, also known by the alias Yung Futon. A member of the CUSTOMS collective, she has gained recognition through KEXP's Midnight in a Perfect World for her propulsive progressive tech-house sets. Her music takes listeners on energetic journeys through electronic soundscapes, earning her a growing following in the Pacific Northwest underground scene.

name: Solar
bio: San Francisco-based DJ and producer, prime player in the Bay Area underground dance music scene for decades. Co-founder of Squirrels On Film label.

name: Soon(ish)
bio: Soon(ish) is Jonathan Cats, a Seattle DJ, Noise Complaint co-founder, and constant flag-bearer for the city's house and techno scene. His SoundCloud bio puts the mission plainly: disco, rolling tech house, deeper 4/4 sounds, and one goal, to make people dance. He has represented Seattle at EDC, Upstream, Cascadia, and Holy Ship, while Noise Complaint has thrown parties from Seattle to San Francisco, Denver, San Diego, New York, and beyond. In Shameless language, Soon(ish) is reliable pressure with hometown pride: the kind of set that knows the room, works the room, and leaves it sweaty.

name: Spaceotter
bio: Seattle DJ raised on acid house and disco between Detroit and Chicago. Found his voice DJing at radical faerie gatherings, Burning Man, and underground clubs in the Pacific Northwest.

name: Subset
bio: SUBSET is Karl Muller, a New Zealand-born, Australia-based DJ and producer working in the deep end of minimal dub techno and dubtronica. His sound lives in reverbs, filtered delays, and slow-pressure architecture, with releases connected to labels such as Rohs\! Records, Telrae, DimbiDeep, and Primary Colours. Rather than chase obvious peaks, SUBSET builds immersion through bass weight, atmosphere, and details that keep expanding the longer you stay with them. The result is a heady, low-lit trip for dancers who want hypnosis with sub pressure and no cheap shortcuts.

name: Succubass
bio: Seattle DJ, alias of Jess Duran. Driving force in Seattle's electronic music scene since 2013. Played at Nowadays NYC, The Lot Radio.

name: Sunshine Jones
bio: Sunshine Jones is a San Francisco house lifer, founding member of Dubtribe Sound System, and one of the rare electronic performers who can make machines feel handmade in real time. Since the late 1980s, he has carried a fiercely DIY philosophy through live improvisational sets, solo work, and the global Dubtribe legacy. His music is rooted in love, community, and radical participation, but it still hits with the physical truth of proper house music. Sunshine Jones is not nostalgia,he is living proof that underground dance music can be spiritual, political, and wildly functional all at once.

name: Supreme La Rock
bio: Seattle DJ, record collector, and KEXP On Air personality. Internationally recognized hip-hop DJ, founder of Conception Records, and member of The Sharpshooters.

name: T.Wan
bio: T.Wan is Tiffany Wan, a Brooklyn-based DJ with deep Seattle origins and a long-running connection to the femme, non-binary, and trans collective TUF. Her monthly Flow State show on Noods Radio reflects the range: techno, jungle, breaks, garage, dubstep, footwork, acid, and left-field club music all moving toward immersion. Before New York rooms like Nowadays, Basement, and Good Room, she cut her teeth in Seattle as a DJ, organizer, and tone-setter for adventurous dance floors. T.Wan brings cerebral bass pressure with real body logic,trippy, percussive, and never stuck in one lane.

name: Tait Modern
bio: Tait Modern is a Seattle DJ, promoter, and community builder woven into the city's underground dance fabric. His SoundCloud bio traces a path through Uniting Souls, Electric Tea Garden, Cascadia, NightJar, punk roots, drum & bass roots, and a current house sound with hard edges. He brings tough, generous house selections with local memory in the grooves.

name: Tara Brooks
bio: Tara Brooks is a Southern California DJ and producer whose deep, hypnotic sound has made her a natural fit for Desert Hearts and West Coast underground circles. Since 2007, she has built a reputation around eclectic, emotionally tuned sets that move through deep grooves, melodic tension, and psychedelic late-night pressure. Her music is polished but not sterile, spiritual but not soft, and always aimed at the long arc of a dance floor. Tara brings desert-tested momentum: sensual, driving, and wide open under the stars.

name: Tek Jones
bio: DJ Tek Jones (aka Ghostboy Jones) is a Seattle-based DJ and producer who has been immersed in underground electronic music and nightlife since the early 2000s, starting his journey while living in Okinawa before building deep roots in the Pacific Northwest scene. A longtime Shameless resident, he is known for genre-blurring sets that move between house, techno, breaks, and left-field selections, always focused on forward-thinking sound and dancefloor connection. As Ghostboy Jones, he explores the deeper, more atmospheric side of his sound with long-form mixes and late-night journeys like his "Around the Fire" sessions, showcasing hypnotic grooves, smoky textures, and meditative rhythms. Whether playing intimate rooftops, late-night lofts, or curated mix series, he brings a designer's ear for detail and a developer's precision to every set.

name: The Perfect Cyn
bio: Pacific Northwest DJ blazing a trail for West Coast dance music since 2002. Known for a sensuous, genre-defying sound.

name: Thorson
bio: Seattle DJ and producer known as Thorson (aka Krisco). Real name Kris Thorson Kellogg. Rocking dance floors in the Pacific Northwest since 2012, specializing in Disco, Funk, and House music. Has performed at Shameless Retreat and various PNW venues.

name: Tons of Fucking Sequins
bio: A glittering journey into the magical world of showtunes and musical theatre. From the early Shameless Breakfast Club era, preserved on the 2014 New Year's Day lineup at Monkey Loft. Billed alongside Area 303, Gato Negro, Dirty Ice, Adlib, Joe Bellingham, Sone, Chad Neiro, Ramiro, Recess, Julian O'Keefe, Sean Majors, Verse, Carlos R, Hydro Craft, and Miss Shelrawka, the project sits squarely in the crew's glitter-streaked afterhours history.

name: Tony H
bio:
Panamanian-born, Seattle-based DJ, producer, and label owner. Known for tech house, deep house, and techno — groove-driven rhythms and acid-tinged basslines built for the dancefloor.

Founder of Late Night Munchies (2015) and its darker sub-label Munchies After Dark (2019). Released on Desert Hearts, Dirtybird, Flashmob Records, Farris Wheel Recordings, Space Yacht, and more. Regular fixture at The Monkey Loft and Kremwerk. Festival credits include Day Trip, Bass Coast, and Miami Music Week.

Named an artist to watch by Kevin Knapp and featured in Gray Area Magazine's "10 Rising Black Artists You Should Know."

name: Totally Enormous Extinct Dinosaurs
bio: Totally Enormous Extinct Dinosaurs is Orlando Higginbottom, the British producer, DJ, and singer-songwriter behind some of the most distinctive left-field pop and house of the last decade-plus. From the colorful early TEED era through later work on Anjunadeep and beyond, his music has always balanced club architecture with melody, melancholy, and oddball charm. He writes dance music that can live in headphones, festival fields, and basement rooms without losing its strange little heartbeat. In a Shameless setting, TEED brings rare crossover magic: emotional, playful, deeply produced, and still built to move bodies.

name: Trinitron
bio: DJ Trinitron is a Seattle-based DJ with a lifelong pull toward electronic music, tracing the obsession back to the early 1990s. As a Viva Recordings resident and the creator of Bounce Brunch, he sits comfortably in the city's house ecosystem while keeping a party-forward sense of fun. His approach is rooted in enthusiasm rather than posturing: bright selections, community energy, and enough range to make daytime joy and late-night movement feel connected. Trinitron brings clean local lift,house music with a smile, a pulse, and real Seattle context.

name: Tyson Wittrock
bio: Tyson Wittrock is a longtime Seattle DJ connected to Shameless event history, Breakfast Club, Decibel-week afterhours, Cascadia Northwest, and collaborative bills with Recess. His lineup history places him alongside Christian Martin, Pezzner, Codebase, Joe Bellingham, Adlib, Innerflight, Bottom Forty, and other Northwest underground players. His profile sits in the older house and techno backbone of the crew's 2010s era: steady, local, trusted, and built around real scene presence.

name: Unknown Player
bio: Unknown Player, also listed in some event indexes as Unknown ?layer, is a Seattle DJ tied to Habitat, The Reason Why, Uniting Souls, Viva Recordings, and Shameless day-party programming. Listings place the name on Reverie Society at Monkey Loft with Black Velveteen, Mz ArTiz, and Blk Lab, plus other Seattle events at Monkey Loft and Kremwerk. The project lives through local lineups and house-centered community rooms, with an underground profile that fits the name.

name: VJ Dirty Vizualz
bio: Dirty Vizualz is a Seattle live VJ and visuals project tied to Shameless' Deck'd Out programming at Monkey Loft. Event listings place Dirty Vizualz on Pride and summer rooftop bills with Open House Collective, IDLE, Hercules & Love Affair, DJHoodriah, Jen Woolfe, HAUS\
instagram_url: GASM, Alfonso Tan, and Your MOM. The project adds motion, color, and live image work to the party environment, helping the rooftop and loft stages feel more immersive without pulling focus from the music.

name: Viper Fengz
bio: Viper Fengz is a Vietnamese-born Seattle drag artist and club DJ known for high-energy queer nightlife. Recent RA listings call her a Seattle drag legend and place her alongside parties leaning into hyperpop, Jersey club, baile funk, techno remixes, and full internet-brain club chaos. That tracks with the performance-first side of her work: loud, fast, funny, and committed to the bit without losing the floor. Viper Fengz brings drag electricity and rave disorder in equal measure.

name: WD4D
bio: WD4D is Waylon Dungan, a Seattle DJ and producer whose sets braid futuristic hip-hop, R\&B, soul, global rhythm, and electronic music into something generous and deeply physical. Dubbed a feel-good force in local DJ culture, he has spent years proving that technical skill and emotional warmth do not need to be opposites. His selections can get heady, but the center is always human: drums, swing, melody, and a room that feels invited rather than instructed. WD4D brings open-hearted range,beat-scene intelligence with block-party gravity.

name: Wax Witch
bio: Seattle vinyl DJ, promoter, and event curator (Isabela Garcia). Founder of Babe Night and co-founder of Danse Macabre. Active in the Seattle underground scene for nearly a decade.

name: Wesley Holmes
bio: Wesley Holmes is a Seattle house-music lifer whose influence in the Pacific Northwest stretches across more than 25 years of parties, records, rooms, and dancers. A DJ's DJ with deep local credibility, he has helped keep the city's house lineage connected to soul, groove, and proper late-night function. His sets carry the ease of someone who does not need to force authority; the records do the talking, and the room follows. Wesley brings foundational Seattle heat,seasoned, generous, and still fully alive on the floor.

name: Wet Peynt
bio: wet peynt is a Seattle live electronic artist and producer working in a playful, machine-driven lane of IDM, tech house, beats, and hardware experimentation. Public artist pages point to Octatrack, Digitakt, SE-02, Peak, Play, M8, and modular gear as part of the setup, with finished releases on Bandcamp and streaming platforms plus demo uploads on SoundCloud. Event history places wet peynt in the Shameless/Desert Hearts orbit for Memorial Day Hijinks at Monkey Loft and in Seattle's live-electronic ecosystem through Patchwerks and Basement State. wet peynt brings a left-field live PA feel: odd textures, skippy grooves, and dance music that keeps its handmade edges visible.

name: Wonder Twinz
bio: Wonder Twinz is the Seattle duo of Ms. Artiz and Julie Herrera, a pairing that shows up in regional festival and Duck Brunch/Shameless-adjacent listings. The project connects two established local community selectors into a playful back-to-back format, with public lineups placing them near names like Levi Clark, Cat Call, Claudia Martinez, Sappho, and other PNW underground artists. Wonder Twinz brings bright communal energy: two DJs trading taste, movement, and room-reading while keeping the floor friendly and alive.

name: Yo Yo Yoga
bio: Yo Yo Yoga is Annie Evasick's Seattle-born yoga and live-DJ project, founded in 2010 at Electric Tea Garden while she was working with Shameless Productions and Decibel Festival. The project connects underground house and techno culture with movement, recovery, and community, bringing DJ-led yoga events to clubs, rooftops, festivals, streams, and wellness spaces without losing its dance-floor roots.

name: Yourmom
bio: Amy Logan, known as yourMOM, is the other half of the ourHOUSE DJ duo. A resident at Massive Club, she plays every 1st Saturday for ourHOUSE at Pony Seattle and every 2nd Saturday for CRUISE/DISCO at the Seattle Eagle. Known for making dancefloors groove with classic house, funk, and soul.

name: ZOF
bio: ZOF is Zoe, a Seattle-based producer, vocalist, DJ, and classically trained pianist turning personal reclamation into exploratory club music. After leaving a demanding science career in the Pacific Northwest, she pushed fully into music, landing releases and support through HE.SHE.THEY., Popgang, Box of Cats, TECHNE, and Dome of Doom. Her sound moves through bass, house, breaks, and left-field electronics with a songwriter's ear for emotional hooks and a producer's hunger for strange texture. ZOF brings a future-facing Seattle energy: smart, raw, melodic, and unwilling to sound like anybody else on the flyer.

name: Zeebo
bio: Seattle DJ Mike Zaretzke, known as Zeebo. A true soldier for the underground community both on the dance floor and behind the decks. Part of Dusty Booty Ranch, Flammable, LOST, and Studio 4/4 crews.
